title: pavonia restiaria
intro: Pavonia restiaria, also known as the 'Rose Mallow' or 'Rock Rose Mallow', is a perennial plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. Traditionally, Pavonia restiaria has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia restiaria include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Pavonia restiaria is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
